items.title: Fix TLS Verification Bypass
items.description: Remove trust-all delegate and implement certificate pinning on the iPhone client using the fingerprint from QR payload.

items.title: Add Desktop Pairing Confirmation
items.description: Block trust endpoint responses until the user manually clicks approve on the Windows desktop host.

items.title: Refactor Tab Bar to Swipeable Panels
items.description: Remove Workspace, Settings, and Activity tabs from the persistent navigation bar. Implement swipeable sheets/overlays for Settings and Activity.

items.title: Remove Blue Accents
items.description: Change active tab icon highlights in animated tab bar to white/off-white.

items.title: Remove Circle Avatars
items.description: Change the circular mask on the Google account avatar to a squircle/rounded rectangle.

items.title: Add Offline Diagnostic View
items.description: Create a dedicated Offline screen overlay when the WebSocket heartbeat fails to reach the bridge.

items.title: Implement DPAPI Encrypted Storage
items.description: Encrypt paired device secret hashes inside trusted-devices.json on the Windows filesystem using DPAPI wrappers.

items.title: Implement Agent Approval Resolution
items.description: Create a REST API route to pass approved or rejected choices from the iPhone client to the running CLI agent session.

items.title: Stream CLI Stdout in Real-Time
items.description: Pipe live spawn stdout events to the client WebSocket instead of buffering till exit.
